locations.name: 南高加索
locations.summary: 南高加索（英語：South Caucasus；喬治亞語：სამხრეთი კავკასია；亞美尼亞語：Հարավային Կովկաս；阿塞拜疆語：Cənubi Qafqaz；俄語：Южный Кавказ）是指高加索山脉以南的格鲁吉亚…

relations.subject: European stonechat
relations.evidence: It is found across Europe, as far east as Ukraine and the South Caucasus, and in parts of North Africa

relations.subject: European stonechat
relations.evidence: European stonechats breed in heathland, coastal dunes and rough grassland with scattered small shrubs and bramble, open gorse, tussocks or heather
relations.object_summary: 东非常见的开放草地与湿地边缘复合景观。
